issue_title: Bug: Start Game button not working
issue_body:
## Bug Report

**Description:**
The Start Game button on the trivia night app is not responding when clicked. Users are unable to start a new game session.

**Steps to Reproduce:**
1. Navigate to the trivia night app
2. Click the "Start Game" button
3. Nothing happens — no game starts, no error shown

**Expected Behaviour:**
Clicking Start Game should initiate a new trivia session and navigate to the first question.

**Actual Behaviour:**
Button click has no effect. Game does not start.

**Priority:** High — blocks core game functionality.
